<!--
Thank you for contributing. Keep this template short — if a checkbox
doesn't apply, strike it through rather than leaving it unchecked.
-->

## What this PR does

<!-- One or two sentences. What changed and why. -->

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New skill (add to the `printr-*` family)
- [ ] Improvement to existing skill
- [ ] Docs / CI / tooling only
- [ ] Breaking change (requires major bump per the versioning policy)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes locally
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally (or `SKILL_LIVE=0 npm test` if you can't reach Jupiter)
- [ ] Changes to any `SKILL.md` are mirrored in `src/` if the code has changed
- [ ] New code paths have matching tests in `tests/`
- [ ] Non-obvious claims carry `[Printr]` / `[pattern]` / `[derived]` provenance tags
- [ ] No secrets, private keys, or `.env` content committed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added under `[Unreleased]` if this is user-visible
